description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

This material is a list page of Hanno City press releases with links to PDF files, not the full text of individual articles.

To create a calendar summary, the full text content of each article is needed.

Please provide one of the following:

1. Specify the exact title of the article you'd like summarized (e.g. "Emergency gun hunting drill to prepare for bear sightings"). Please also provide the PDF content as text.

2. If you need multiple articles summarized, please provide article titles paired with their full text content.

3. Alternatively, send the individual article PDFs separately, and I can summarize them.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/hishokohoka/hisho/hodohappyo/houdouhappyou2025/11596.html
summary: ℹ️ Unable to translate: this is a list of links to press releases, not article content
